top3.sql:
SELECT COUNT(*) 
FROM Patient p
JOIN Laboratory l ON p.ID = l.ID
WHERE p.SEX = 'M' 
  AND p.Birthday BETWEEN '1936-01-01' AND '1956-12-31'
  AND l.CPK > (
    SELECT MAX(CAST(value AS REAL)) 
    FROM (
      SELECT '150' AS value UNION ALL 
      SELECT '200' UNION ALL 
      SELECT '160' UNION ALL 
      SELECT '180' UNION ALL 
      SELECT '220'
    )
  );
  
-- Note: SQLite does not have a built-in way to get reference ranges, 
-- so assuming normal upper limit for CPK is around 200 U/L (typ...

SELECT COUNT(*) 
FROM Patient p
JOIN Laboratory l ON p.ID = l.ID
WHERE p.SEX = 'M' 
  AND p.Birthday BETWEEN '1936-01-01' AND '1956-12-31'
  AND l.CPK > 200;

SELECT COUNT(*)

  AND l.CPK > (
    SELECT MAX(CAST(value AS REAL))

SELECT COUNT(*) 
FROM Patient p
JOIN Laboratory l ON p.ID = l.ID
WHERE p.SEX = 'M' 
  AND p.Birthday BETWEEN '1936-01-01' AND '1956-12-31'
  AND l.CPK > 200;

SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT p.ID)  
FROM Patient p  
INNER JOIN Laboratory l ON p.ID = l.ID  
WHERE p.SEX = 'M'  
  AND p.Birthday >= '1936-01-01'  
  AND p.Birthday <= '1956-12-31'  
  AND l.CPK > 200;
